create-cloudflare.description: Scaffold a Cloudflare project with create-cloudflare (C3) and make it Nx-ready

binding.description: Add a binding (KV, R2, D1, Durable Object, Queue, Workflow, Service) to a Worker — edits wrangler.jsonc, stubs code + migrations, emits a test, and refreshes wrangler types

configuration.description: Add Cloudflare configuration (wrangler.jsonc + inferred serve/deploy/typegen targets) to an existing Nx project
